design_vision.core_concept: Connecting traditional academic excellence with futuristic AI infrastructure. The design oscillates between 'Clean Academic Authority' (Light Mode) and 'Deep Tech Immersion' (Dark Mode).

headings.usage: Main titles, slide headers, key metric numbers. Use 'Outfit' for a balance of geometric modernism and friendly approachability.

body.usage: Paragraphs, data labels, UI elements. 'Manrope' is excellent for interface legibility and numeric data.

presentation_mode.navigation: Floating dot indicators or progress bar
presentation_mode.transition: Smooth scroll-snap or framer-motion slide effects

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.classes: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle radial gradients behind key images or metrics.

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background, overlay with dark gradient

coding_student.usage: CodeFoundry section or Student Impact slide

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 24px or 48px for features

data_visualization.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use 'AreaChart' for growth trends, 'BarChart' for comparisons, 'PieChart' for distribution.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1. Use 'text-shadow' on text over images.
accessibility.motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion'. Wrap animations in motion-safe checks.

tech_stack_instructions.routing: Use React Router. Create a '/presentation' route for the slide deck and '/' for the main dashboard/landing.
tech_stack_instructions.state: Use simple local state or Context API for the presentation slide index.
tech_stack_instructions.animation: Framer Motion is PREFERRED for slide transitions and card hover effects.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Avoid full-screen gradients. Use mesh gradients or subtle spotlights.
Interactive elements must have micro-interactions (hover, click).
